howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.client1Desc: Browse available offers or post a request with your flight needs.
howItWorks.client2Desc: Compare prices, aircraft, and operators. Empty legs have automatic discounts.
howItWorks.client3Desc: Pay by card securely through Stripe. Your payment is protected.
howItWorks.client4Desc: Use the built-in chat to coordinate flight details with your operator.
howItWorks.client5Desc: Show up at the airport/heliport and enjoy your private flight.
howItWorks.operator1Desc: Create your operator account and connect your Stripe account to receive payments.
howItWorks.operator2Desc: Add your fleet and publish available flights, including empty legs with dynamic discounts.
howItWorks.operator3Desc: Customers book and pay online. You receive the payment minus the 8% fee.
howItWorks.operator4Desc: Use the chat to coordinate details with your customers and complete the flight.

operatorsLanding.title: Monetize your empty flights
operatorsLanding.subtitle: Join FlyCharter and maximize your fleet revenue
operatorsLanding.benefit1Desc: Access a customer base looking for private flights across Argentina.
operatorsLanding.benefit2Desc: Payments are processed with Stripe. You receive your money automatically and securely.
operatorsLanding.benefit3Desc: Publish your repositioning flights with dynamic pricing and reduce operating costs.
operatorsLanding.benefit4Desc: You only pay an 8% fee when a booking is completed. No subscription costs.
operatorsLanding.faq1A: You can set up automatic discounts that lower the price as the flight date approaches. Ideal for empty legs.
operatorsLanding.faq2Q: When and how do I receive my payments?
operatorsLanding.faq2A: Payments are automatically transferred to your Stripe account after each confirmed flight, minus the 8% fee.
operatorsLanding.faq3Q: What requirements do I need to register?
operatorsLanding.faq3A: You need to be a licensed air operator with registered aircraft. We will verify your documentation.
operatorsLanding.faq4Q: What happens if a customer cancels?
operatorsLanding.faq4A: Each offer has its own cancellation policy that you define when publishing the flight.
operatorsLanding.faq5A: You can contact us by email at soporte@flycharter.com.ar or by WhatsApp.
